title: abutilon orbiculatum
intro: Abutilon orbiculatum, also known as the flowering maple or Indian mallow, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Abutilon orbiculatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Abutilon orbiculatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
